name: Fujian Nebula Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Fujian Nebula Electronics Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells battery test equipment and solutions in China. Its product portfolio includes Li-ion battery pack PCM testers, Li-ion battery pack semi-product/end product testers, Li-ion battery pack cycle testers, power battery pack BMS testers, power battery pack EOL testers, power battery pack working condition simulators, ES inverters, wind-solar- charging-ESS control systems, automatic cell sorting machines, automatic cell and spot welding machines, Li-ion battery intelligent manufacture solution and MES, etc. The company also offers bidirectional inverters, charging piles, plasma cleaning machines, Li-on cell distance detection machines, polarity detect machines, cell holders uploading machines, and cell tidying machines, as well as laser welding and dispensing machines. Fujian Nebula Electronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Fuzhou, China.
